=== null || session === void 0 ? void 0 : (_session_user = session.user) === null || _session_user === void 0 ? void 0 : _session_user.accountType) === \"driver\") {\n                var _session_user1;\n                const userId = session === null || session === void 0 ? void 0 : (_session_user1 = session.user) === null || _session_user1 === void 0 ? void 0 : _session_user1.id;\n                if (userId) {\n                    router.push(\"/drivers/\".concat(userId));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }[\"RideShareHome.useEffect\"], [\n        status,\n        const savedRide = localStorage.getItem(\"ongoingRide\");\n            const savedHistory = localStorage.getItem(\"rideHistory\");\n            if (savedRide) {\n                try {\n                    const ride = JSON.parse(savedRide);\n                    setPickup(ride.pickup || \"\");\n                    setDestination(ride.destination || \"\");\n                    setPickupCoords(ride.pickupCoords || null);\n                    setDestinationCoords(ride.destinationCoords || null);\n                    setRouteGeometry(ride.routeGeometry || null);\n                    setFare(ride.fare || null);\n                    setRideStatus(ride.rideStatus || \"idle\");\n                    setDriver(ride.driver || null);\n                    setIsFindingDriver(ride.isFindingDriver || false);\n                    setActiveRideId(ride.activeRideId || null);\n                    setCompletedRide(ride.completedRide || null);\n                    setShowRideSummary(ride.showRideSummary || false);\n                    // If there's an active ride or price was shown, restore showPrice\n                    if (ride.rideStatus && ride.rideStatus !== \"idle\" || ride.showPrice) {\n                        setShowPrice(true);\n                    }\n                } catch (e) {\n                // ignore corrupt state\n                }\n            }\n            if (savedHistory) {\n                try {\n                    setRideHistory(JSON.parse(savedHistory));\n                } catch (e) {\n                // ignore\n                }\n            }\n            setIsInitialized(true);\n        }\n    }[\"RideShareHome.useEffect\"], []);\n    // Persist ongoing ride\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"RideShareHome.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            const rideState = {\n                pickup,\n                destination,\n          activeRideId,\n                completedRide,\n                showRideSummary,\n                showPrice\n            };\n            if (rideStatus !== \"idle\") {\n     const handleStorageEvent = {\n                \"RideShareHome.useEffect.handleStorageEvent\": (event)=>{\n                    if (event.key === \"ongoingRide\" && event.newValue) {\n                        try {\n                            const ride = JSON.parse(event.newValue);\n                            setPickup(ride.pickup);\n                            setDestination(ride.destination);\n                            setPickupCoords(ride.pickupCoords);\n                            setDestinationCoords(ride.destinationCoords);\n                            setRouteGeometry(ride.routeGeometry);\n                            setFare(ride.fare);\n                            setRideStatus(ride.rideStatus);\n || ride.showPrice) {\n                                setShowPrice(true);\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                        // ignore\n                        }\n                    } else if (event.key === \"ongoingRide\" && !event.newValue) {\n                        resetAllStates();\n                    } else if (event.key === \"rideHistory\" &&                     }\n                    }\n                }\n            }[\"RideShareHome.useEffect.handleStorageEvent\"];\n            window.addEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorageEvent);\n            return ({\n                \"RideShareHome.useEffect\": ()=>window.removeEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorageEvent)\n            })[\"RideShareHome.useEffect\"];\n        // (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useCallback)({\n        \"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\": async (data)=>{\n            console.log(\"📨 Received:\", data.type, data);\n            switch(data.type){\n                case \"connected\":\n                    console.log(\"✅ Server connected:\", data.message);\n                    break;\n                case \"driver_response\":\n                case \"driver_accepted\":\n                    if (data.accepted && data.driverId) {\n                        setIsLoadingDriverDetails(true);\n                        setIsFindingDriver(false);\n                        try {\n                            const realDriverData = await _services_driver_service__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_8__.driverService.fetchDetails(data.driverId);\n                            if (realDriverData) {\n                                const                    status: \"accepted\",\n                                    estimatedArrival: data.estimatedArrival\n                                };\n \"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\": ()=>setRideStatus(\"driver-coming\")\n                                }[\"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\"], 2000);\n                            } else {\n                                setApiError(\"Failed to load driver details.\");\n                                setIsFindingDriver(true);\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            setApiError(\"Failed to load driver details.\");\n                            setIsFindingDriver(true);\n                        } finally{\n                            setIsLoadingDriverDetails(false);\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        setApiError(\"Driver declined. Searching for another driver...\");\n                    }\n                    break;\n                case \"driver_location_update\":\n                case \"location_update\":\n                case \"driver_location\":\n                    if (data.coords) {\n                        const coords = (0,_utils_coordinates__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_12__.normalizeCoordinates)(data.coords);\n                        setDriver({\n                            \"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\": (prev)=>{\n                                if (!prev) return null;\n                                setPickupCoords({\n                                    \"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\": (currentPickup)=>{\n                                        if (coords &&                   if (distance < _constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_14__.WS_CONFIG.ARRIVAL_THRESHOLD && prev.status !== \"arrived\") {\n                         }\n                                }[\"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\"]);\n                                return {\n }\n                    break;\n                case \"ride_started\":\n                    setRideStatus(\"in-progress\");\n                    setApiError(null);\n                    break;\n                case \"ride_completed\":\n                    setDriver({\n                        \"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\": (currentDriver)=>{\n                                    id: data.driverId || \"unknown\",\n                                        name: data.driverName || \"Driver\",\n                                 ],\n                                        status: \"completed\",\n                                        phone: \"\",\n                   setIsLoadingDriverDetails(false);\n                                    setApiError(null);\n                                    return currentFare;\n }[\"RideShareHome.useCallback[handleWebSocketMessage]\"]);\n                    break;\n                case \"ride_status\":\n                    if (data.status) setRideStatus(data.status);\n \"RideShareHome.useEffect.handleBeforeUnload\": (event)=>{\n                    if (isFindingDriver || rideStatus === \"in-progress\" || rideStatus === \"driver-coming\" || rideStatus === function() {\n    return [\n        next_auth_react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.useSession,\n        next_navigation__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.useRouter,\n        _hooks_useGeolocation__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_10__.useGeolocation,\n        _hooks_useStableWebSocket__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.useStableWebSocket\n    ];\n});\n_c4 = RideShareHome;\nvar _c, _c1, _c2, _c3, _c4;\n$RefreshReg$(_c, \"MapView\");\n$RefreshReg$(_c1, \"GlowButton\");\n$RefreshReg$(_c2, \"GlassCard\");\n$RefreshReg$(_c3, \"SectionDivider\");\n$RefreshReg$(_c4, \"RideShareHome\");\n\n\n;\n    // Wrapped in an IIFE to avoid polluting the global scope\n    ;\n    (function () {\n        var _a, _b;\n        // Legacy CSS implementations will `eval` browser code in a Node.js context\n        // to extract CSS. For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./app/page.tsx\n"));

/***/ })

});
